components.name: Nx monorepo init
components.description: Initialize Nx monorepo with workspace configuration, nx.json, and root package.json. Configure apps/ and packages/ directories per ADR-017 V3.

components.name: Folder structure per ADR-017 V3
components.description: Create full monorepo folder structure: apps/portal, apps/dashboard, apps/support, apps/studio, apps/admin, apps/api, packages/ui, packages/db, packages/auth, packages/api-client, packages/validators, packages/email.

components.name: Command Center app setup
components.description: Bootstrap Command Center Next.js 15 app at apps/command-center with App Router, Tailwind CSS 4, TypeScript strict mode, port 4000 configuration.

components.name: phases.json creation
components.description: Create workplan/phases.json with all 7 phases (0-6), project metadata, and full V2 task list. Serves as the primary data source for Command Center dashboards.

components.name: 22 ADR files
components.description: Create 22 Architecture Decision Record markdown files in workplan/adr/ covering all major architectural decisions: monorepo, auth, DB schema, design system, API strategy, deployment, etc.

components.name: CLI scanner (cc:scan)
components.description: Implement cc:scan CLI script that traverses the monorepo, collects component counts, ADR status, phase progress, and writes scan results to workplan/scan-results.json.

components.name: CLI report (cc:report)
components.description: Implement cc:report CLI script that reads scan results and phases.json, then outputs a formatted terminal report showing phase completion, component coverage, and blocking issues.

components.name: 6 CC pages
components.description: Build all 6 Command Center pages: Mission Control (overview), Phase Tracker (phases.json viewer), Components (design system status), Content (ADR/docs), Architecture (dependency graph), Dependencies (package audit).

components.name: Design tokens — color palette
components.description: Define full color palette in packages/ui/src/tokens/colors.ts — brand, surface, text, border, status, and semantic tokens for light/dark themes.

components.name: Design tokens — typography
components.description: Define typography tokens in packages/ui/src/tokens/typography.ts — font families, sizes, weights, line heights, letter spacing using LINE Seed JP as primary font.

components.name: Design tokens — spacing & radii
components.description: Define spacing scale and border radius tokens in packages/ui/src/tokens/spacing.ts and radii.ts — 4px base grid system consistent with Tailwind v4.

components.name: Design tokens — shadows & elevation
components.description: Define shadow and elevation tokens in packages/ui/src/tokens/shadows.ts — card shadows, modal overlays, dropdown elevations for dark theme.

components.name: Design tokens — animation
components.description: Define animation tokens in packages/ui/src/tokens/animation.ts — easing curves, duration values, transition presets for consistent motion.

components.name: Design tokens — Tailwind config mapping
components.description: Map all design tokens to Tailwind CSS 4 config in packages/ui/tailwind.config.ts — custom color classes, spacing, radii, shadows, typography utilities.

components.name: cn() helper and token utilities
components.description: Implement cn() class composition helper using clsx + tailwind-merge, plus color getter utilities and token accessor functions in packages/ui/src/utils/.

components.name: Primitive — Button
components.description: Build Button primitive using shadcn/ui base — variants (default, destructive, outline, ghost, link), sizes (sm, md, lg), loading state, icon support.

components.name: Primitive — Badge
components.description: Build Badge primitive using shadcn/ui base — variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline), status colors mapped to design tokens.

components.name: Primitive — Dialog
components.description: Build Dialog primitive using shadcn/ui base — accessible modal with header/content/footer slots, overlay backdrop, keyboard dismiss.

components.name: Primitive — Input
components.description: Build Input primitive using shadcn/ui base — text, email, password, number types, error state, label integration, helper text.

components.name: Primitive — Select
components.description: Build Select primitive using shadcn/ui base — single and multi-select, searchable, grouped options, async loading state.

components.name: Primitive — Table
components.description: Build Table primitive using shadcn/ui base — sortable columns, row selection, pagination, empty state, loading skeleton rows.

components.name: Primitive — Tabs
components.description: Build Tabs primitive using shadcn/ui base — horizontal and vertical orientations, keyboard navigation, URL-synced active tab option.

components.name: Primitive — Tooltip
components.description: Build Tooltip primitive using shadcn/ui base — accessible hover/focus trigger, configurable delay, placement options.

components.name: Primitive — Popover
components.description: Build Popover primitive using shadcn/ui base — trigger + content pattern, positioning, click-outside dismiss, focus trap.

components.name: Primitive — Sheet
components.description: Build Sheet primitive using shadcn/ui base — slide-in panels from left/right/top/bottom, overlay, keyboard dismiss, nested sheets.

components.name: Primitive — Card
components.description: Build Card primitive using shadcn/ui base — header/content/footer composition, interactive hover state, bordered and filled variants.

components.name: Primitive — Separator
components.description: Build Separator primitive using shadcn/ui base — horizontal and vertical orientations, decorative vs semantic modes.

components.name: Primitive — Skeleton
components.description: Build Skeleton primitive using shadcn/ui base — shimmer animation, configurable dimensions, compose-able for complex loading states.

components.name: Primitive — Toast
components.description: Build Toast primitive using shadcn/ui base — success/error/warning/info variants, auto-dismiss, action button, stack management.

components.name: Primitive — Progress
components.description: Build Progress primitive using shadcn/ui base — determinate and indeterminate states, configurable color via design tokens, accessible label.

components.name: Domain component — ThemeCard
components.description: Build ThemeCard domain component — displays theme preview thumbnail, name, category, 65-theme support, active/inactive status indicator.

components.name: Domain component — PluginGrid
components.description: Build PluginGrid domain component — responsive grid of plugin cards with icon, name, version, compatibility badge, install/activate actions.

components.name: Domain component — LicenseLock
components.description: Build LicenseLock domain component — gate UI element that shows locked state for premium features, upgrade CTA, entitlement tier display.

components.name: Domain component — PricingComparison
components.description: Build PricingComparison domain component — side-by-side plan comparison table, feature matrix, highlighted recommended plan, billing toggle.

components.name: Domain component — FeatureList
components.description: Build FeatureList domain component — checklist of plan features with included/excluded indicators, entitlement-aware rendering, tooltip explanations.

components.name: Domain component — SearchPanel
components.description: Build SearchPanel domain component — full-text search input with instant results dropdown, recent searches, category filters, keyboard navigation.

components.name: Domain component — ResourceSidebar
components.description: Build ResourceSidebar domain component — contextual right panel showing related docs, quick links, support resources based on current page context.

components.name: Domain component — EntitlementBadge
components.description: Build EntitlementBadge domain component — compact badge showing user's current plan tier (free/pro/agency), upgrade prompt for locked tiers.

components.name: Domain component — TicketPreview
components.description: Build TicketPreview domain component — support ticket card with status, priority, subject, date, assignee — used in ticket lists and sidebars.

components.name: Domain component — UserRow
components.description: Build UserRow domain component — table row for user management — avatar, name, email, role badge, plan tier, last active, action menu.

components.name: Domain component — StatCard
components.description: Build StatCard domain component — KPI card with metric value, label, trend indicator (up/down/neutral), sparkline chart, comparison period.

components.name: Domain component — EmptyState
components.description: Build EmptyState domain component — zero-data state with illustration slot, heading, description, primary CTA button, contextual messaging.

components.name: Domain component — SearchSuggestion
components.description: Build SearchSuggestion domain component — single suggestion item in search dropdown — icon, title, category tag, keyboard shortcut hint.

components.name: Domain component — ThemeStatusIndicator
components.description: Build ThemeStatusIndicator domain component — real-time indicator showing active theme name, version, update availability, one-click update action.

components.name: DB schema — 6 domains, 25+ tables
components.description: Define Supabase PostgreSQL schema per ADR-020 V3 — 6 domains: identity, commerce, content, support, analytics, notifications — 25+ tables with relations, indexes, constraints.

components.name: DB RLS policies
components.description: Implement Row Level Security policies for all tables — user-scoped data isolation, org-scoped access, admin bypass rules, service-role policies.

components.name: Auth — Supabase Auth integration per ADR-005 V2
components.description: Implement authentication layer per ADR-005 V2 — Supabase Auth with JWT, session management, email/password and OAuth providers, auth middleware for App Router.

components.name: Auth — Entitlement resolvers per ADR-022
components.description: Implement entitlement resolution system per ADR-022 — plan tier lookup, feature flag evaluation, license validation, cached entitlement checks for SSR.

components.name: Package — @cmsmasters/ui
components.description: Finalize packages/ui shared package — export all primitives and domain components, configure package.json with proper exports map, build pipeline, Storybook integration.

components.name: Package — @cmsmasters/db
components.description: Finalize packages/db shared package — Supabase client factory, type-safe query helpers, migration runner, schema type exports generated from Supabase.

components.name: Package — @cmsmasters/auth
components.description: Finalize packages/auth shared package — auth utilities, session helpers, middleware factories, entitlement hooks, role constants, type exports.

components.name: Package — @cmsmasters/api-client
components.description: Finalize packages/api-client shared package — typed API client for CF Workers API, request/response types, error handling, retry logic, auth header injection.

components.name: Package — @cmsmasters/validators
components.description: Finalize packages/validators shared package — Zod schemas for all domain entities (user, theme, plugin, ticket, order), shared validation utilities, parse helpers.

components.name: Package — @cmsmasters/email
components.description: Finalize packages/email shared package — React Email templates for transactional emails, Resend integration, template registry, preview server.

components.name: Infra — Vercel Portal deployment
components.description: Configure Vercel deployment for Portal app — project settings, environment variables, preview deployments, production domain, edge runtime config.

components.name: Infra — Vercel Static SPAs deployment
components.description: Configure Vercel deployments for static SPA apps (Dashboard, Support, Studio, Admin) — static export builds, routing config, CDN optimization.

components.name: Infra — CF Workers API deployment
components.description: Configure Cloudflare Workers deployment for API service — wrangler.toml, D1/KV bindings, custom domain routing, environment variable secrets.

components.name: Infra — Nx config and build pipeline
components.description: Configure Nx workspace — project.json for all apps and packages, task executors, build/test/lint targets, affected commands, remote caching setup.

components.name: Infra — CI/CD pipeline
components.description: Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD — lint, typecheck, test, build workflows, Nx affected optimization, auto-deploy to Vercel and CF Workers on main branch merge.

components.name: Infra — Storybook
components.description: Configure Storybook for packages/ui — stories for all primitives and domain components, Tailwind integration, dark theme default, Chromatic visual testing.

components.name: Portal app bootstrap
components.description: Bootstrap Next.js 15 Portal app at apps/portal — App Router, Tailwind v4, shared packages integration, layout shell, metadata config.

components.name: Portal — Theme marketplace
components.description: Build theme marketplace pages — browsable catalog of 65 themes with filters (category, price, rating), search, ThemeCard grid, theme detail page with preview.

components.name: Portal — Plugin marketplace
components.description: Build plugin marketplace pages — plugin catalog with PluginGrid, compatibility filters, plugin detail with screenshots, changelogs, installation guide.

components.name: Portal — Pricing page
components.description: Build pricing page with PricingComparison component — Free/Pro/Agency tiers, FeatureList per plan, billing toggle (monthly/annual), upgrade CTA flows.

components.name: Portal — Authentication flows
components.description: Implement auth flows — sign up, sign in, forgot password, email verification, OAuth (Google, GitHub), session persistence, protected route middleware.

components.name: Portal — Account management
components.description: Build account pages — profile settings, password change, notification preferences, connected accounts, active sessions management, account deletion.

components.name: Portal — License management
components.description: Build license management pages — active licenses list, license key display, domain assignments, renewal flow, LicenseLock gating for premium features.

components.name: Portal — Checkout and billing
components.description: Implement checkout flow — cart, payment method (Stripe), order confirmation, billing history, invoice downloads, subscription management.

components.name: Dashboard app bootstrap
components.description: Bootstrap Dashboard SPA at apps/dashboard — Vite + React 19, Tailwind v4, react-router, auth guard, shared packages integration.

components.name: Dashboard — Overview page
components.description: Build main dashboard overview — StatCard grid (themes installed, plugins active, licenses, tickets), recent activity feed, quick action shortcuts.

components.name: Dashboard — Installed themes manager
components.description: Build installed themes management — ThemeCard grid, ThemeStatusIndicator, update notifications, activate/deactivate, one-click update flow.

components.name: Dashboard — Installed plugins manager
components.description: Build installed plugins management — PluginGrid with status, version tracking, update alerts, bulk update actions, plugin configuration links.

components.name: Dashboard — Downloads
components.description: Build downloads section — downloadable files for owned products, version history, changelog viewer, re-download links, download analytics.

components.name: Dashboard — Analytics
components.description: Build analytics dashboard — Recharts-powered usage graphs, theme/plugin performance metrics, traffic sources, conversion tracking, date range picker.

components.name: Dashboard — Notifications
components.description: Build notifications center — categorized alerts (updates, billing, support), mark read/unread, notification preferences link, real-time badge count.

components.name: Support app bootstrap
components.description: Bootstrap Support SPA at apps/support — Vite + React 19, Tailwind v4, react-router, auth integration, shared packages setup.

components.name: Support — Ticket list and creation
components.description: Build ticket management — TicketPreview list view, search/filter, create ticket form with category/priority selection, file attachment, status tracking.

components.name: Support — Ticket detail and replies
components.description: Build ticket detail page — threaded conversation, markdown rendering, file attachment view, status timeline, escalation flow, satisfaction rating.

components.name: Support — Knowledge base
components.description: Build knowledge base — categorized articles, SearchPanel integration, SearchSuggestion results, ResourceSidebar related articles, article rating.

components.name: Support — Documentation viewer
components.description: Build documentation viewer — MDX-based docs with navigation sidebar, table of contents, code blocks with syntax highlighting, version selector.

components.name: Support — Live chat integration
components.description: Integrate live chat widget — real-time messaging via Supabase Realtime, typing indicators, agent assignment, chat history, offline fallback to ticket.

components.name: Studio app bootstrap
components.description: Bootstrap Studio SPA at apps/studio — Vite + React 19, Tailwind v4, react-router, auth guard, canvas rendering setup, shared packages integration.

components.name: Studio — Theme builder canvas
components.description: Build visual theme builder — live preview canvas, CSS variable editor, color picker integration, typography controls, spacing adjustments, real-time preview.

components.name: Studio — Theme export and publish
components.description: Build theme export pipeline — generate theme package, validate output, version bump flow, publish to marketplace, draft/published/archived states.

components.name: Admin app bootstrap
components.description: Bootstrap Admin SPA at apps/admin — Vite + React 19, Tailwind v4, react-router, admin-role auth guard, shared packages integration.

components.name: Admin — User management
components.description: Build user management — UserRow Table with search/filter, user detail modal, role assignment, plan override, account suspension, impersonation.

components.name: Admin — Content management
components.description: Build content management — theme/plugin CRUD, marketplace listing editor, screenshot uploader, pricing configuration, category management.

components.name: Admin — Support queue
components.description: Build admin support queue — all tickets view, agent assignment, bulk actions, SLA tracking, escalation management, canned response library.

components.name: Admin — Analytics dashboard
components.description: Build admin analytics — revenue metrics, user growth charts, product performance, support volume, conversion funnels, exportable reports.

components.name: API service bootstrap
components.description: Bootstrap Cloudflare Workers API service at apps/api — Hono framework, TypeScript, D1 database bindings, KV cache, Zod validation, OpenAPI spec generation.

components.name: API — Core domain routes
components.description: Implement core API routes — /themes, /plugins, /licenses, /users, /orders, /tickets — CRUD operations, auth middleware, rate limiting, caching headers.

components.name: API — Webhook handlers
components.description: Implement webhook handlers — Stripe payment events, license activation triggers, update notifications, email queue dispatch, signature verification.

components.name: Performance optimization
components.description: Performance optimization pass — Core Web Vitals audit, image optimization, bundle analysis, edge caching strategy, database query optimization, load testing.

components.name: Security hardening
components.description: Security hardening — CSP headers, CORS configuration, rate limiting rules, SQL injection audit, XSS prevention, dependency vulnerability scan, pen test.

components.name: Production launch
components.description: Production launch checklist — DNS cutover, SSL certificates, monitoring setup (Sentry, Grafana), runbook documentation, on-call rotation, go-live announcement.
